examples: He was a ladies' man. A cheater. A player.
The ability to accurately understand how others are feeling may be used by a doctor to find how best to help her patients, while a cheater might use it to control potential victims.
A cheater doesn't learn from the test, which deprives him/her of an education.
Indeed, so vicious that it is often impossible to simply punish the cheater him or herself.
According to Santo, a cheater is going to cheat and a drinker is going to drink.
